top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%outpatient%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%inpatient%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outpatient_to_inpatient_ratio
FROM Examination e
JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis = 'SLE' AND p.Admission = 'Outpatient' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis = 'SLE' AND p.Admission IN ('Inpatient', 'Outpatient') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Outpatient_to_Inpatient_Ratio
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis = 'SLE';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%outpatient%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%inpatient%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outpatient_to_inpatient_ratio
FROM Examination e
JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis = 'SLE' AND p.Admission = 'Outpatient' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis = 'SLE' AND p.Admission IN ('Inpatient', 'Outpatient') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Outpatient_to_Inpatient_Ratio
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis = 'SLE';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.Admission = 'Outpatient' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) /
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.Admission = 'Inpatient' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) AS Outpatient_to_Inpatient_Ratio
FROM Patient p
WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SLE'
  AND p.Admission IN ('Inpatient', 'Outpatient');

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%outpatient%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%inpatient%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outpatient_to_inpatient_ratio
FROM Examination e
JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis = 'SLE' AND p.Admission = 'Outpatient' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis = 'SLE' AND p.Admission IN ('Inpatient', 'Outpatient') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Outpatient_to_Inpatient_Ratio
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis = 'SLE';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.Admission = 'Outpatient' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) /
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.Admission = 'Inpatient' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) AS Outpatient_to_Inpatient_Ratio
FROM Patient p
WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SLE'
  AND p.Admission IN ('Inpatient', 'Outpatient');

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%outpatient%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%inpatient%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outpatient_to_inpatient_ratio
FROM Examination e
JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%';
